task_completion.description: Verify that a portfolio named 'Tax Lots 2024' has been created in JStock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Tax Lots 2024' in the portfolio dropdown or tab in the JStock interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the first COST buy transaction is recorded with 10 shares at $638.22 on December 1, 2023.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a buy record for COST showing 10 units, a price of 638.22, and a date of Dec 1, 2023 in the portfolio view or transaction dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the first COST buy transaction includes the correct fees and comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for broker commission of 4.95, clearing fee of 0.20, and the comment 'COST lot 1 Dec 2023' associated with the first COST lot.

task_completion.description: Verify the second COST buy transaction is recorded with 8 shares at $715.40 on January 19, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a buy record for COST showing 8 units, a price of 715.40, and a date of Jan 19, 2024 in the portfolio view or transaction dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the second COST buy transaction includes the correct fees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for broker commission of 4.95 and clearing fee of 0.20 associated with the second COST lot.

integrity.description: The agent used the JStock GUI to create the portfolio and enter transactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the JStock application window with dialog boxes for buying stocks, not terminal commands or text editors modifying XML/CSV files directly.

integrity.description: The agent actually entered the data into the application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or selecting values in the JStock input fields (e.g., stock code, price, date, fees).

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots should show step-by-step GUI interaction rather than a sudden appearance of all data without intermediate input steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target portfolio: 'Tax Lots 2024'. Required COST buy lot 1: 10 shares at $638.22 on Dec 1, 2023, broker commission $4.95, clearing fee $0.20, comment 'COST lot 1 Dec 2023'. Required COST buy lot 2: 8 shares at $715.40 on Jan 19, 2024, broker commission $4.95, clearing fee $0.20. Note: The prices are synthetically generated and must match exactly. Only evaluate the COST lots explicitly mentioned in the task description.
